what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-27, declaring it as design ground-truth and pointing to a JPEG blob.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger record for an image asset
mime is image/jpeg but w and h are both 0
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body contains only a one-line SOURCE design ground-truth caption
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg
The file’s only descriptive content is the SOURCE design ground-truth line
Empty links array leaves the asset unconnected to other ledger entries
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata
Names the file with image__{channel}_{path} convention
References content via a blob:// URI
Records provenance with source, author_session, and created timestamp
concerns: Zero width and height for an image asset suggests incomplete metadata extraction
No links or relationships to other ledger items
Blob integrity and location cannot be verified from this file alone
Very little descriptive context about what the image depicts
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a design-source image that records provenance and a blob pointer but lacks dimensions, links, and descriptive content.
questions: Why are the image width and height both 0?
What does the capital-raise/p-27 image actually depict?
Where is the blob blob://b2:3d404ef67d96b6285e49e9e5f92fa238 physically stored?
How is this asset intended to be referenced by other ledger entries?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a design ground-truth image record matches the metadata, but the zero dimensions and empty links make the record feel incomplete.
apparent_themes: Addressable ledger entries for media blobs
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a design-source image as a stable, addressable ground-truth asset in the channel-memory ledger.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record that links a design-source image identifier to a blob, author session, and timestamp, supporting asset provenance and retrieval in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-27 with a blob pointer, author session, timestamp, and a SOURCE design ground-truth caption.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to catalog a design-source image asset as ground truth in the channel-memory ledger.
